summary: Portfolio momentum is improving with chief-scout showing recovery and kb returning to healthy status with active deployment. However, director remains completely stalled and neutralworking has developed new deployment failures that need immediate attention.

soft-power.one_liner: Maintaining high velocity with 24 commits this week, still needs CI/CD setup

director.one_liner: Still completely stalled for 30+ days, critical game project abandoned

chief-scout.one_liner: Strong recovery with 60 commits but still has failing tests and workflows

kb.one_liner: Returned to health with working deployments and recent commits

wellness-session.one_liner: Steady acceleration with working deployments, addressing feature requests

language-tidbits.one_liner: Exceptional pace with 29 commits this week, needs CI/CD infrastructure

brain-levelup.one_liner: Continued acceleration with 4 commits, needs deployment monitoring

crumble.one_liner: Still dormant for 30+ days despite working CI/CD

neutralworking.one_liner: New deployment failures blocking releases despite ongoing development

head-of-product.one_liner: Strong momentum with 11 commits, still has blocking TODOs to resolve

cross_project_ranking.action: Fix failing test suite (test_red_card, test_injury_sub, test_extra_time) and restore broken workflows
cross_project_ranking.reason: High-priority development tool showing recovery but core functionality still broken, blocking team productivity

cross_project_ranking.action: Set up CI/CD pipeline for deployment monitoring and stability
cross_project_ranking.reason: Top priority visual novel maintaining exceptional momentum but lacks deployment infrastructure

needs_decision.question: Should this dormant web-app be archived or revived?
needs_decision.recommendation: Archive as completed - 30+ days of inactivity with working CI/CD suggests project completion
